description: Contractor browse projects page renders at /contractor/browse
steps: Open contractor.browse.tsx and verify it uses RoleGuard with allowedRole='contractor'
Verify it renders Navbar, ContractorSidebar, and main content area
Verify it displays browseProjectsTitle and browseProjectsDesc from i18n

description: Browse projects page loads browsable buildings and checks existing applications
steps: Open contractor.browse.tsx and verify useEffect calls listBrowsableProjects
Verify it calls getContractorProfile for the current user
Verify it fetches company names via getCompany for each unique companyId
Verify it checks existing applications via getContractorApplicationForBuilding for each building
Verify appliedIds state tracks which buildings have been applied to

description: ProjectCard component displays building info with Apply button
steps: Open ProjectCard.tsx and verify it renders building cover image or placeholder
Verify it shows title, status badge, company name, address, estimated completion
Verify Apply button is disabled with 'Already Applied' text when alreadyApplied is true
Verify Apply button calls onApply callback when not already applied

description: ApplicationModal allows contractor to submit application
steps: Open ApplicationModal.tsx and verify it renders a Modal with form
Verify form includes message textarea (required), specialty select, proposed rate input, currency select
Verify on submit it calls createApplication with correct data
Verify on success it calls onSuccess callback, shows toast, and closes modal
